backend/main.mo: Main backend actor implementing an e-commerce system with product management, shopping cart, user profiles, Stripe payment integration, role-based access control (admin/user permissions), and migration support for persistent state.
backend/migration.mo: Migration module that transforms old product schema (with reviews field) to new schema (without reviews), preserving all other state including cart, user profiles, and Stripe configuration during canister upgrades.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting the deployment error diagnosis and Stripe payment integration fix, listing affected files, components (stripe@3.0.0, http-outcalls@3.0.0, authorization@4.0.0), and test requirements.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON-formatted summaries of all frontend TypeScript/React files including pages (product listing, cart, payment, admin), hooks (React Query, auth), components (header, footer, payment setup), and styling configuration.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with OKLCH color system defining light and dark mode theme variables including neutral grayscale palette and chart colors for consistent UI theming.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point for the React application with UTF-8 charset, viewport meta tag, 'GLORY 123' title, and module script loading main.tsx.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root application component using TanStack Router to define all routes (products, cart, payment, admin, success/failure pages) with a shared layout containing Header and Footer components.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Footer component displaying GLORY 123 branding, contact information (phone 9892246308, Mumbai address), social media links (Facebook, Instagram, X), and Caffeine.ai attribution with UTM tracking.
frontend/src/components/Header.tsx: Sticky navigation header with GLORY 123 logo, navigation links to Products and Admin pages, and shopping cart icon with dynamic item count badge using React Query cart data.
frontend/src/components/PaymentSetup.tsx: React component that displays a form for configuring Stripe payment settings (secret key and allowed countries) when Stripe is not yet configured. Hides itself once Stripe configuration is complete.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom React hook that creates and manages the backend actor instance with authentication, handling both anonymous and authenticated states via Internet Identity. Invalidates dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useAdminAuth.ts: Custom React hook that manages admin authentication state using sessionStorage, providing login/logout functions and authentication status. Simple session-based authentication without backend verification.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides React context and hooks for Internet Identity authentication, managing login flow, identity state, and AuthClient lifecycle. Includes provider component and useInternetIdentity hook for accessing authentication context.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for all backend data operations including products, cart management, Stripe configuration, and checkout session creation. Handles query caching and automatic invalidation on mutations.
frontend/src/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom CSS variables defining a yellow/gold color theme for both light and dark modes. Includes base styles for typography and layout.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that sets up React root with QueryClientProvider for React Query and InternetIdentityProvider for authentication context. Renders the main App component.
frontend/src/pages/AdminPage.tsx: Admin dashboard page with password-protected login (hardcoded 'admin123') and product management form for adding new products with name, category, price, description, and image upload. Uses session-based authentication.
frontend/src/pages/CartPage.tsx: Displays shopping cart with items, quantities, and totals. Allows users to update quantities, remove items, and proceed to payment or continue shopping.
frontend/src/pages/OrderSuccessPage.tsx: Simple success confirmation page shown after order placement with options to continue shopping or view cart.
frontend/src/pages/PaymentFailurePage.ts: Error page displayed when payment fails, providing troubleshooting tips and options to retry payment or return to cart.
frontend/src/pages/PaymentPage.tsx: Payment checkout page that integrates with Stripe, displays order summary, and handles creating checkout sessions to redirect users to Stripe payment.
frontend/src/pages/PaymentSuccessPage.ts: Success page shown after successful Stripe payment, invalidates cart queries and provides navigation options to continue shopping or view cart.
frontend/src/pages/ProductDetailPage.tsx: Detailed product view page showing product image, description, price, and category with add-to-cart functionality.
frontend/src/pages/ProductListPage.tsx: Main product listing page with hero banner, search functionality, category filtering, and grid display of all products.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for extracting, storing, and managing URL parameters from both regular query strings and hash-based routing, with sessionStorage persistence support.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration defining custom color schemes using OKLCH, typography, container queries, animations, and design tokens for a component library.
project_state.json: Project metadata tracking a deployment error fix for Version 5 production launch related to Stripe payment integration.
